name: Latent AI + Striveworks + Shield AI + Vectara
summary: Four AFWERX/SBIR-adjacent awardees: Latent AI (LEIP edge inference), Striveworks (Chariot MLOps), Shield AI (Hivemind autonomy/EdgeOS, closed), Vectara (Trusted RAG, 53+ public repos incl. hallucination-leaderboard).
killinchu_fit: Edge governance overlay: Lambda-axis policy gates on field-updatable models (Latent AI), data-lineage governance on Chariot (Striveworks), explainability overlay for EdgeOS Pilot blocks (Shield AI, partnership-only), RAG-bias mitigation on Vectara pipelines.
hooks: Latent AI LEIP: Lambda policy gates on edge models (Jetson Orin/Snapdragon)
Shield AI Hivemind: governance/explainability overlay (partnership, not OSS PR)
Vectara RAG: bias/Lambda-governance layer (direct AFWERX 26.1 lane)
